view.title: View Territory Webworks {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome raven?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome raven has been resent. Check your messenger raven perch.

buyIp.title: Commission Additional Stronghold Coordinates Addon
buyIp.costDescription: Gold Cost ({symbol}) every moon as your territory webworks is inscribed
buyIp.confirmMessage: Additional stronghold coordinates gold cost: {symbol}{cost}/moon. Are you sure you want to commission additional stronghold coordinates?

migration.title: Migrate Your Territory Webworks
migration.registeredUsername: Registered Hero Name / Raven Address / Guild ID
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the territory is live/busy with high traffic, can we set a holding page during migration?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Does this territory have special requirements like PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Do you also want us to help you transfer the territory name registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Do you want us to update the nameservers as soon as we finish the data migration?
migration.note1: Filling out this scroll will post a new quest for our guild support officers to begin your migration.
migration.note2: Please be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid any delays on your quest.
migration.note3: A typical migration is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of data to move is large.
migration.note4: The old hosting territory needs to be online and accessible while we are performing the migration, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Please do not make any updates on your territory while we perform the migration, otherwise those data may not be copied to the new hosting.
